steps.title: Count the frequency of each distinct number
steps.content:
In the data 4, 4, 4, 4, 8, 8, 8, 13, 13:
  • 4 appears 4 times
  • 8 appears 3 times
  • 13 appears 2 times

steps.title: Match to the correct frequency table
steps.content: A frequency table pairs each unique number with its count. The table listing Number [4, 8, 13] with corresponding Frequency [4, 3, 2] exactly matches our counts. That matches choice A - A is correct.
